sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, utf8_string String, value Float64, date_value Date);
SELECT leftUTF8(utf8_string, 4) FROM test_table WHERE value != ANY (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE date_value >= '2023-10-01');
SELECT id, leftUTF8(utf8_string, -1) AS trimmed_string FROM test_table WHERE value != ANY (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table WHERE utf8_string != '皆さん');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT leftUTF8(utf8_string, 2) AS sub_str FROM test_table GROUP BY sub_str HAVING sub_str != '') WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE date_value < '2023-10-02');
SELECT id, leftUTF8(utf8_string, 6) AS utf8_excerpt FROM test_table WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE date_value = max(date_value) OVER (PARTITION BY value));
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value < 3.0;
SELECT leftUTF8(utf8_string, -2) AS sliced_string FROM temp_table WHERE id != ANY (SELECT id FROM temp_table WHERE utf8_string IS NULL);
SELECT leftUTF8(utf8_string, position(utf8_string, '你好')) FROM test_table WHERE value != ANY (SELECT value FROM temp_table WHERE id > 0);
